!important;}.has-luminous-vivid-orange-to-vivid-red-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--luminous-vivid-orange-to-vivid-red) !important;}.has-very-light-gray-to-cyan-bluish-gray-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--very-light-gray-to-cyan-bluish-gray) !important;}.has-cool-to-warm-spectrum-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--cool-to-warm-spectrum) !important;}.has-blush-light-purple-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--blush-light-purple) !important;}.has-blush-bordeaux-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--blush-bordeaux) !important;}.has-luminous-dusk-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--luminous-dusk) !important;}.has-pale-ocean-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--pale-ocean) !important;}.has-electric-grass-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--electric-grass) !important;}.has-midnight-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--midnight) !important;}.has-small-font-size{font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--small) !important;}.has-medium-font-size{font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--medium) !important;}.has-large-font-size{font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--large) !important;}.has-x-large-font-size{font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--x-large) !important;}

<!--[if lt IE 9]> <script src="https://www.lyricszones.com/wp-content/themes/hueman/assets/front/js/ie/html5shiv-printshiv.min.js"></script> <script src="https://www.lyricszones.com/wp-content/themes/hueman/assets/front/js/ie/selectivizr.js"></script> <![endif]--><link rel="preload" as="style" href="//fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Open+Sans&display=swap" /><style class="wpcode-css-snippet">/* Prevent layout shift for images */
img {
  max-width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* YouTube / iframe CLS fix */
iframe {
  max-width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
}

/* Homepage hero section priority */
.home .entry-content > *:first-child {
  contain: layout paint;
}

/* Reduce heavy effects on first view */
.home * {
  animation: none !important;
  transition: none !important;
}

/* Remove heavy hover effects on mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  *:hover {
    transition: none !important;
  }
}

/* Sticky header CLS fix */
.site-header {
  min-height: 60px;
}

/* Menu tap speed */
.nav-menu a {
  touch-action: manipulation;
}

body {
  font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
}
img {
  max-width: 100%;
  height: auto;
}

/* Homepage LCP Critical */
.home .entry-thumbnail img,
.home .featured-image img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

.single-post .entry-title,
.single-post h1 {
  font-size: 32px;          /* adjust for your theme */
  line-height: 1.3;
  font-weight: 700;
  min-height: 2.6em;        /* reserves space */
}

.entry-title {
  transform: none !important;
  animation: none !important;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .single-post .entry-title {
    font-size: 24px;
    line-height: 1.35;
    min-height: 3em;
  }
}</style><style class="wpcode-css-snippet">.lz-az-filter {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.lz-az-filter a {
    padding: 10px 14px;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: #333;
}

.lz-az-filter a.active,
.lz-az-filter a:hover {
    background: #f2f2f2;
}

.home img:first-child</style><style class="wpcode-css-snippet">.share-box {
  margin: 20px 0;
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
}

.share-heading {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  color: #333;
}

.social-share {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.social-share a {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 8px 14px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: #fff;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: 0.3s;
}

.social-share i {
  margin-right: 6px;
  font-size: 14px;
}

/* Brand Colors */
.facebook       { background: #1877f2; }
.facebook-share { background: #0d47a1; }
.twitter        { background: #1da1f2; }
.linkedin       { background: #0077b5; }
.reddit         { background: #ff4500; }
.whatsapp       { background: #25d366; }
.pinterest      { background: #bd081c; }

/* Hover effect */
.social-share a:hover {
  opacity: 0.85;
}</style><style class="wpcode-css-snippet">.outline-icons {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
}

.outline-icons a {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  border: 2px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 8px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 22px;
  color: #555;
  background: transparent;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  text-decoration: none;
}

/* Brand outline colors */
.outline-icons .facebook  { border-color: #1877f2; color: #1877f2; }
.outline-icons .twitter   { border-color: #1da1f2; color: #1da1f2; }
.outline-icons .linkedin  { border-color: #0077b5; color: #0077b5; }
.outline-icons .pinterest { border-color: #bd081c; color: #bd081c; }
.outline-icons .telegram  { border-color: #0088cc; color: #0088cc; }
.outline-icons .instagram { border-color: #e4405f; color: #e4405f; }
.outline-icons .whatsapp  { border-color: #25d366; color: #25d366; }
.outline-icons .print     { border-color: #6c757d; color: #6c757d; }

/* Hover effect - fills background with brand color */
.outline-icons a:hover {
  color: #fff;
  transform: scale(1.1);
}

.outline-icons .facebook:hover  { background: #1877f2; }
.outline-icons .twitter:hover   { background: #1da1f2; }
.outline-icons .linkedin:hover  { background: #0077b5; }
.outline-icons .pinterest:hover { background: #bd081c; }
.outline-icons .telegram:hover  { background: #0088cc; }
.outline-icons .instagram:hover { background: #e4405f; }
.outline-icons .whatsapp:hover  { background: #25d366; }
.outline-icons .print:hover     { background: #6c757d; }</style><link rel="icon" href="https://www.lyricszones.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/cropped-20230912_183705-32x32.png" sizes="32x32" /><link rel="icon" href="https://www.lyricszones.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/cropped-20230912_183705-192x192.png" sizes="192x192" /><link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="https://www.lyricszones.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/cropped-20230912_183705-180x180.png" /><meta name="msapplication-TileImage" content="https://www.lyricszones.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/cropped-20230912_183705-270x270.png" /><style id="wp-custom-css">/*GeneratePress Customization by web insights*/
.page-header-image-single-post .attachment-full{
box-shadow: rgba(23,43,99,.3) 0 7px 100px;
border-radius:5px;
}
.entry-content h3,h4,h5 {
font-weight:400;
padding: 6px 6px 6px 6px;
background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #1FA2FF 100%, #1FA2FF 100%, #1FA2FF 100%);
border-radius:5px;
color:white!important;
box-shadow: rgba(23,43,99,.3) 0 7px 100px;
}
.entry-content h3{
font-size:12px!important;
}
.entry-content h4{
font-size:12px!important;
}
.entry-content h5{
font-size:12px!important;
}

/* Table of Content*/
:root {
	--dark-grey: #333333;
  --background-color: #eee;
	--main-color: #1FA2FF;
	--font-size: 19px;
	--line-height: 1.5;
 
}

.table-of-contents  {
  border-left: 4px solid #00bcd4; /* Teal blue line */
  padding: 15px 20px;
  background-color: #f5f7fa; /* Soft background */
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 17px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin: 20px 0;
  color: #222;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
}

.table-of-contents .toc-headline {
	font-size: 20px;
	color: var(--dark-grey);
	font-weight: 400;
	display: block;
	cursor: pointer;
  margin-top: .3rem;
}

.table-of-contents ul {
	padding: 0;
}

.table-of-contents li {
	position: relative;
	list-style: none;
	line-height: var(--line-height);
	font-weight: 400;
	margin: .3rem 0;
	transition: .2s ease all;
}

.table-of-contents li a {
	font-size: var(--font-size);
	line-height: var(--line-height);
	color: #2EB893
}

.table-of-contents li>ul {
	padding-left: 1rem;
	padding-bottom: .5rem;
}

.table-of-contents a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.table-of-contents a {
  background:
    linear-gradient(
      to right,
      rgba(100, 200, 200, 1),
      rgba(100, 200, 200, 1)
    ),
    linear-gradient(
      to right,
      rgba(255, 0, 0, 1),
      rgba(255, 0, 180, 1),
      rgba(0, 100, 200, 1)
  );
  background-size: 100% 2px, 0 2px;
  background-position: 100% 100%, 0 100%;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  transition: background-size 400ms;
}

.table-of-contents a:hover {
  background-size: 0 2px, 100% 2px;
}


/* Yoast FAQ Section */
.schema-faq-section {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 20px;
  margin: 10px 0;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

/* FAQ Question */
.schema-faq-section h3 {
  font-size: 20px;
  color: #e91e63; 
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
  padding-right: 30px;
  transition: color 0.3s;
}

.schema-faq-section h3:hover {
  color: #c2185b;
}

/* FAQ Answer */
.schema-faq-section p {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: #333;
  background: #f9f9f9;
  padding: 15px;
  border-left: 5px solid #00bcd4;
  border-radius: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}

/* Optional: Add icon before questions (like + or -) */
.schema-faq-section h3::after {
  content: "➤";
  position: absolute;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  color: #e91e63;
  font-size: 18px;
  transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Optional: Hide icon for open questions using JS (if interactive) */
/* You can use classes like .open to toggle it */
.schema-faq-section h3.open::after {
  transform: rotate(270deg);
}

/* === Universal Post Box Style for Home, Category, Tag === */
.home .post, .category .post, .tag .post,
.home article, .category article, .tag article {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 13px;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
  transition: all 0.35s ease-in-out;
  gap: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}


/* === Thumbnail Image === */
.home .post img, .category .post img, .tag .post img,
.home article img, .category article img, .tag article img {
  width: 100px;
  height: 100px;
  border-radius: 3px;
  object-fit: cover;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

/* Zoom thumbnail slightly on hover */
.home .post:hover img, .category .post:hover img, .tag .post:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.1);
}

/* === Content Area === */
.home .post .post-content, .category .post .post-content, .tag .post .post-content {
  flex: 1;
}

/* === Post Title === */
.home .post h1, .category .post h1, .tag .post h1,
.home article h1, .category article h1, .tag article h1 {
  margin: 0 0 4px;
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.4;
  color: #222;
}

/* Title link */
.home .post a, .category .post a, .tag .post a {
  color: #1e88e5;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.25s ease;
}

.home .post a:hover, .category .post a:hover, .tag .post a:hover {
  color: #e91e63;
}

/* === Category & Tag Meta Info === */
.home .post .meta, .category .post .meta, .tag .post .meta {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #666;
}

.home .post .meta span,
.category .post .meta span,
.tag .post .meta span {
  margin-right: 10px;
  display: inline-block;
}

.home .post .meta a,
.category .post .meta a,
.tag .post .meta a {
  color: #777;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.2s ease-in-out;
}

.home .post .meta a:hover,
.category .post .meta a:hover,
.tag .post .meta a:hover {
  color: #1e88e5;
}

/* === Responsive Layout === */
@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .home .post, .category .post, .tag .post,
  .home article, .category article, .tag article {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: left;
  }

  .home .post img, .category .post img, .tag .post img {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    max-width: 320px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .home .post .post-content {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

.simple-highlight-box {
  border-left: 4px solid #00bcd4; /* Teal blue line */
  padding: 15px 20px;
  background-color: #f5f7fa; /* Soft background */
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 17px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin: 20px 0;
  color: #222;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
}

.custom-quote-box {
  border-left: 4px solid #d32f2f; /* deep red line */
  padding: 15px 20px;
  background-color: #ffe5e5; /* light red background */
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 17px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin: 20px 0;
  color: #b71c1c; /* dark red text */
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
}
.single-post article p:first-of-type {
  border-left: 4px solid #00bcd4; /* Teal blue line */
  padding: 15px 20px;
  background-color: #f5f7fa; /* Soft background */
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 17px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin: 20px 0;
  color: #222;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
	text-align: left; /*  Ensures left alignment */
}

.single-post article p {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 1.4;
  font-weight: 400;
  margin: 15px 0;
  color: #111;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'Noto Sans', 'Mukta', 'Arial', sans-serif;
  word-wrap: break-word;
}

.custom-toc-box {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border-left: 4px solid #16cfc1;
  padding: 16px;
  margin: 20px 0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 16px;
}

.custom-toc-box strong {
  display: block;
  font-size: 18px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  color: #111;
}

.custom-toc-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding-left: 0;
  margin: 0;
}

.custom-toc-list li {
  margin: 6px 0;
}

.custom-toc-list a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #0073aa;
}

.custom-toc-list a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Indentation based on heading level */
.toc-level-1 { padding-left: 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; }
.toc-level-2 { padding-left: 5px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; }
.toc-level-3 { padding-left: 10px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; }
.toc-level-4 { padding-left: 15px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; }
.toc-level-5 { padding-left: 20px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; }
.toc-level-6 { padding-left: 25px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; }

html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

/* Center all headings inside post content */
.single-post h2,
.single-post h5,
.single-post h6 {
  text-align: center;
}

/* Universal Ad Slot */
.ad-slot {
  width: 100%;
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  margin: 20px 0;
  background: #ffffff;
  overflow: hidden;
}


/* Desktop */
@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .ad-top {
    min-height: 250px; /* 728x90 / 970x250 */
  }
}

/* Tablet */
@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1023px) {
  .ad-top {
    min-height: 200px;
  }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .ad-top {
    min-height: 250px; /* 300x250 */
  }
}



/* Desktop container width */
@media (min-width: 1200px) {
  .container-inner,
  .content,
  .main-inner {
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
  }
}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1199px) and (min-width: 768px) {
  .container-inner,
  .content,
  .main-inner {
    max-width: 100%;
    padding-left: 8px;
    padding-right: 8px;
  }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .container-inner,
  .content,
  .main-inner {
    max-width: 100%;
    padding-left: 8px;
    padding-right: 8px;
  }
}


body {
  overflow-x: hidden;
}


.single .container-inner,
.page .container-inner {
  max-width: 100% !important;
}


.lz-alphabet {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
}

.lz-alphabet a {
    padding: 10px 14px;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: #333;
    background: #fff;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.lz-alphabet a:hover {
    background: #f2f2f2;
}


.lz-filter-box {
    text-align: center;
}

.lz-categories,
.lz-alphabet {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 12px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.lz-categories a,
.lz-alphabet a {
    padding: 12px 18px;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 12px;
    background: #fff;
    color: #333;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.lz-categories a:hover,
.lz-alphabet a:hover {
    background: #f2f2f2;
}


.lz-tax-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
    gap: 18px;
    max-width: 700px;
    margin: auto;
}

.lz-tax-btn {
    padding: 16px;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 14px;
    background: #fff;
    text-align: center;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: #333;
}

.lz-tax-btn:hover {
    background: #f3f3f3;
}



.home h1 {
  min-height: 1.3em;
}

/* Homepage main title size fix */
.home h1,
.home .entry-title {
  font-size: 20px;
  line-height: 1.3;
  font-weight: 400;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}


@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .home h1,
  .home .entry-title {
    font-size: 22px;
    line-height: 1.35;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
